pawel       2011-10-04 19:01:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    audio/freeswitch-sounds Makefile distinfo 
  Log:
  - Update to version 1.0.16
  - Add option to download various bitrates (saves time on compile/resampling)
  - Add option to set audio scaling with FREESWITCH_VSCALE variable

  Submitted by:   Eric F Crist <ecrist@secure-computing.net> (maintainer)
  Approved by:    miwi, wen (mentors implicit)
